message:
fix: revert process_queue in BulkheadPermit Drop, cancel timer node in wheel test

BulkheadPermit::drop was calling process_queue(Time::ZERO) which
pre-empted the caller-driven queue processing model, causing 3 test
failures. Queue advancement is the caller's responsibility after
release_permit.

The intrusive_wheel_next_expiration test dropped a TimerNode while
still linked in the wheel, triggering the safety assertion. Added
wheel.cancel() before the node goes out of scope.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
